title: Information for media :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Information for media
This section includes links to information on how we work, topics that could be of high interest (common topics), statistics and latest news.
- News centre All latest immigration news published on the Immigration New Zealand (INZ) website, including common topics.
All latest immigration news published on the Immigration New Zealand (INZ) website, including common topics.
- Media enquiries Information for media organisations on how to contact the Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment (MBIE) media team.
Information for media organisations on how to contact the Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment (MBIE) media team.
- How we work Find out who Immigration New Zealand is and what we do.
Find out who Immigration New Zealand is and what we do.
- Common topics Common topics provide an overview of key issues, statistics and answers to questions we often get from the media.
Common topics provide an overview of key issues, statistics and answers to questions we often get from the media.
- Statistics Stats on how many people leave New Zealand, as well as people who come to New Zealand and the reason for their visits.
Stats on how many people leave New Zealand, as well as people who come to New Zealand and the reason for their visits.
- Processing times Wait times for NZeTAs and other main visas.
Wait times for NZeTAs and other main visas.
